column1: # NEUTRAL STUB — intentionally header-only, zero rows.
# This file ships inside the plugin and describes no particular repo. Concrete rows here
# would be inherited by every consumer, where the paths do not resolve — the exact failure
# mode this stub exists to avoid. (It previously carried 18 pre-de-vendoring
# `.claude/agents/*` rows, which is how it came to be treated as a live baseline.)
# Your repo's real baseline is written to <repo>/.claude/prose-budget.baseline.tsv by
# `prose-budget.sh --update-baseline`, and that is what the checker reads when present.
# Until then every tracked file reports NEW — a warning, never a failure.
